# Evaluate AI-Powered DevOps

## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI logged in
- Azure OpenAI, Azure Monitor, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Azure Container Apps access

## Step 2: Execute
```bash
node engine/index.js solution-plays/37-ai-powered-devops/fai-manifest.json --eval
```

## Step 3: Verify
Confirm results meet thresholds.
